Conversation snippet, dinner, 2026-04-18:

Molly: "You're going to look back at this six months from now and either say 'that was the year I built the foundation' or 'that was the year I burned out building scaffolding for nothing.' Which one depends on whether anyone other than us uses it."
Kody: "That's why the RAPPstore matters. The bookfactoryagent has to hatch in someone else's brainstem."
Molly: "Then ship the fucking thing already."
